segments.text: Bow down your ear, O Lord, hear me: for I am poor and needy.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: A Prayer: or, A Prayer, being a Psalm of David

segments.text: Preserve my soul; for I am holy: O you my God, save your servant that trusts in you.
segments.speaker: David

footnotes: holy: or, one whom thou favourest

segments.text: Be merciful to me, O Lord: for I cry to you daily.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Rejoice the soul of your servant: for to you, O Lord, do I lift up my soul.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For you, Lord, are good, and ready to forgive; and plenteous in mercy to all them that call on you.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Give ear, O Lord, to my prayer; and attend to the voice of my supplications.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: In the day of my trouble I will call on you: for you will answer me.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Among the gods there is none like you, O Lord; neither are there any works like your works.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: All nations whom you have made shall come and worship before you, O Lord; and shall glorify your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For you are great, and do wondrous things: you are God alone.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Teach me your way, O Lord; I will walk in your truth: unite my heart to fear your name.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: I will praise you, O Lord my God, with all my heart: and I will glorify your name for evermore.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: For great is your mercy toward me: and you have delivered my soul from the lowest hell.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O God, the proud are risen against me, and the assemblies of violent men have sought after my soul; and have not set you before them.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: But you, O Lord, are a God full of compassion, and gracious, longsuffering, and plenteous in mercy and truth.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: O turn to me, and have mercy on me; give your strength to your servant, and save the son of your handmaid.
segments.speaker: David

segments.text: Show me a token for good; that they which hate me may see it, and be ashamed: because you, Lord, have helped me, and comforted me.
segments.speaker: David
